title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入圭亚那：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入圭亞那：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Guyana GNBS conformity requirements, GEA renewable energy policy, GPL grid-connection requirements (including GPL Grid Code, IEEE 1547, and NEC 2014 references), Guyana Fire Service and GNBS building fire-safety requirements, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and Guyana's mixed-frequency grid context (predominantly 60 Hz / 120–240 V on the coastal DBIS, with some 50 Hz legacy areas) — versus China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB 44240-2024 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与圭亚那GNBS合格评定要求、GEA可再生能源政策、GPL并网要求（包括GPL电网规范、IEEE 1547及NEC 2014参考）、圭亚那消防局及GNBS建筑消防安全要求、UN 38.3运输要求以及圭亚那混频电网背景（沿海DBIS主网以60 Hz / 120–240 V为主，部分遗留区域为50 Hz）——对比中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 36276-2023及GB 44240-2024基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與圭亞那GNBS合格評定要求、GEA可再生能源政策、GPL併網要求（包括GPL電網規範、IEEE 1547及NEC 2014參考）、圭亞那消防局及GNBS建築消防安全要求、UN 38.3運輸要求以及圭亞那混頻電網背景（沿海DBIS主網以60 Hz / 120–240 V為主，部分遺留區域為50 Hz）——對比中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 36276-2023及GB 44240-2024基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, GNBS conformity scope determination, GPL grid-connection approval, Guyana Fire Service fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current GNBS standards, GPL Grid Code and Interim Interconnection Requirements, GEA policy requirements, Guyana Fire Service building fire-safety requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、GNBS合格评定范围裁定、GPL并网批准、圭亚那消防局消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行GNBS标准、GPL电网规范及临时并网要求、GEA政策要求、圭亚那消防局建筑消防安全要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、GNBS合格評定範圍裁定、GPL併網批准、圭亞那消防局消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行GNBS標準、GPL電網規範及臨時併網要求、GEA政策要求、圭亞那消防局建築消防安全要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Guyana does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or a Saudi SABER-type mandatory conformity route. BESS projects in Guyana operate primarily under project-specific standards referenced in GPL grid-connection agreements, GEA renewable energy policy, and Guyana Fire Service / GNBS building fire-safety requirements. A critical hardware consideration unique to Guyana is its mixed-frequency grid: the coastal Demerara-Berbice Interconnected System (DBIS) — where utility-scale BESS projects are concentrated — operates predominantly at 60 Hz with 120/240 V (single-phase) and 208/240 V (three-phase), while some legacy inland areas retain 50 Hz supply. Chinese BESS power conversion systems (PCS) are designed and validated for China's 50 Hz / 220–380 V grid; installation on Guyana's 60 Hz / 120–240 V coastal grid requires PCS reconfiguration, re-validation, and re-parameterisation — this must be addressed explicitly in project specifications. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Guyana are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence, the internationally expected baseline for project acceptance; (2) IEC 62933 system-level technical requirements where referenced in GPL or project-owner specifications; (3) GPL grid-connection approval under the GPL Grid Code and Interim Interconnection Requirements, with reference to IEEE 1547 and NEC 2014; (4) Guyana Fire Service / GNBS building fire-safety compliance, including evidence aligned with NFPA 855 where adopted for stationary BESS; (5) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory under international transport conventions for shipment via Georgetown (Guyana's main port); and (6) 60 Hz / 120–240 V PCS reconfiguration for the coastal DBIS grid. Chinese GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558-2023 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62619 or IEC 62933 evidence in project or authority review.
answer_first.zh: 圭亚那尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与欧盟《电池法规》或沙特SABER类强制合格评定路径相当。圭亚那的BESS项目主要依据GPL并网协议、GEA可再生能源政策以及圭亚那消防局/GNBS建筑消防安全要求中引用的项目专属标准运作。圭亚那独特的硬件关键考量在于其混频电网：公用事业规模BESS项目集中的沿海德默拉拉-伯比斯互联系统（DBIS）主要以60 Hz运行，电压为120/240 V（单相）及208/240 V（三相），而部分内陆遗留区域仍为50 Hz供电。中国BESS储能变流器（PCS）针对中国50 Hz / 220–380 V电网设计和验证；在圭亚那60 Hz / 120–240 V沿海电网上安装须进行PCS重新配置、重新验证和重新参数设定——这必须在项目规格中明确处理。中国BESS出口圭亚那的实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，为项目验收的国际预期基准；（2）GPL或项目业主规格中引用的IEC 62933系统级技术要求；（3）依据GPL电网规范和临时并网要求（参考IEEE 1547及NEC 2014）取得GPL并网批准；（4）圭亚那消防局/GNBS建筑消防安全合规，包括固定式BESS采用NFPA 855时的符合性证据；（5）经由乔治敦（圭亚那主要港口）运输的国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件；（6）针对沿海DBIS电网60 Hz / 120–240 V的PCS重新配置。中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023是生产基准，但在项目或主管机关审查中不被接受为IEC 62619或IEC 62933证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 圭亞那尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與歐盟《電池法規》或沙特SABER類強制合格評定路徑相當。圭亞那的BESS項目主要依據GPL併網協議、GEA可再生能源政策以及圭亞那消防局/GNBS建築消防安全要求中引用的項目專屬標準運作。圭亞那獨特的硬件關鍵考量在於其混頻電網：公用事業規模BESS項目集中的沿海德默拉拉-伯比斯互聯系統（DBIS）主要以60 Hz運行，電壓為120/240 V（單相）及208/240 V（三相），而部分內陸遺留區域仍為50 Hz供電。中國BESS儲能變流器（PCS）針對中國50 Hz / 220–380 V電網設計和驗證；在圭亞那60 Hz / 120–240 V沿海電網上安裝須進行PCS重新配置、重新驗證和重新參數設定——這必須在項目規格中明確處理。中國BESS出口圭亞那的實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，為項目驗收的國際預期基準；（2）GPL或項目業主規格中引用的IEC 62933系統級技術要求；（3）依據GPL電網規範和臨時併網要求（參考IEEE 1547及NEC 2014）取得GPL併網批准；（4）圭亞那消防局/GNBS建築消防安全合規，包括固定式BESS採用NFPA 855時的符合性證據；（5）經由喬治敦（圭亞那主要港口）運輸的國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件；（6）針對沿海DBIS電網60 Hz / 120–240 V的PCS重新配置。中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023是製造基準，但在項目或主管機關審查中不被接受為IEC 62619或IEC 62933證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
